hero.name: Dev Kumar
hero.description: I'm Dev Kumar, a Full Stack Developer from India passionate about building scalable web applications, solving complex problems with Data Structures & Algorithms, and exploring Web3 technologies.

description: Developing scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and Express.
Building REST APIs and integrating them with modern frontend frameworks.
Collaborating with development teams to optimize application performance and implement new features.

items: Solved 450+ Data Structures and Algorithms problems.

Actively learning Web3 and blockchain development.

contact.title: About
contact.description:
Hi, I'm Dev Kumar, a Computer Science student at Narula Institute of Technology graduating in 2027. I am passionate about Full Stack Development, Data Structures & Algorithms, and Web3 technologies.

I enjoy building scalable web applications using React, Node.js, Express, Django, and SQL. I also love solving algorithmic challenges in C++ and learning system design concepts.

Currently, I am working as a Full Stack Developer Intern at Future Inters and focusing on improving my backend architecture and blockchain development skills.
contact.contact_message: I'm open to internships, freelance projects, and collaborations. Feel free to reach out!
